steps.title: Write the two savings models
steps.content: Barbara starts with $70$ dollars and adds $10$ dollars per week, so her savings after $x$ weeks are $70+10x$. Maria starts with $120$ dollars and adds $5$ dollars per week, so her savings are $120+5x$.

steps.title: Set the amounts equal
steps.content: The savings are the same when $$70+10x=120+5x.$$ Subtract $5x$ and $70$ from both sides: $$5x=50,$$ so $x=10$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: A quick arithmetic check gives $70+10(10)=170$ and $120+5(10)=170$. Both values match, so the answer is choice C, 10.
